{{Quote|Where are those drinks we ordered?|Gana Lavin|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
'''Gana Lavin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who grew up in the [[Upper City]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. In [[3956 BBY]], she ordered drinks at the [[Upper City Cantina]] with a friend. When her order was delayed, she mistook [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], for a [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]]. This sparked a short argument that ended when her drinks finally arrived.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Where did you get those clothes—a trash compactor in the Lower City?|Gana Lavin, to Revan|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Gana Lavin was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="KotOR" /> [[Gender/Legends|female]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|city world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. She grew up in the luxury of the [[Upper City]], and her actions led many to consider her spoiled. She occasionally used [[Bodyguard/Legends|enforcers]] employed by her [[Gana Lavin's father|father]] to harass new acquaintances.<ref name="CSWE" /> She continued to live on Taris during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], who had occupied and [[Blockade/Legends|blockaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="KotOR" /> In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', in which Gana Lavin appears, in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> shortly after the [[Attack on the Endar Spire|attack]] on the Republic [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] ''[[Endar Spire]]'' above the planet, Lavin was present in the [[Upper City Cantina]], buying drinks for herself and a [[Noble/Legends|noble]].<ref name="KotOR" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
[[File:LavinCantina.png|thumb|left|250px|Gana Lavin in the Upper City Cantina with a young noble]]
Former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who had [[Amnesia/Legends|lost]]<ref name="KotOR" /> his<ref name="CSWE Revan">{{CSWECite|III|97|Revan}}</ref> memory and believed himself to be a [[Republic soldier]], entered the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] after surviving the battle overhead. Despite ordering the drinks some [[Time/Legends|time]] before, Lavin and the noble had not yet received them. When Revan approached Lavin, she mistakenly believed him to be a [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]], insulting his choice of [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] and demanding to know why her order had not yet arrived.<ref name="KotOR" />

Revan apologized and attempted to explain that he was not an employee of the cantina, but Lavin refused to listen and threatened to use her [[Parent/Legends|father's]] influence to have Revan fired. Revan persuaded her not to become upset and agreed to bring Lavin her order. At that point, a [[Unidentified Human waiter|waiter]] arrived bearing Lavin's and the noble's drinks, defusing the situation and allowing Revan to leave.<ref name="KotOR" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Why is the help here so incompetent? One word from Daddy and I could get you fired!|Gana Lavin threatens Revan|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Gana Lavin had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and light skin. When Lavin's drink order at the Upper City Cantina was late, she grew impatient and called the cantina staff incompetent. Lavin bluntly expressed her dislike of Revan's clothing and insulted him. She often relied on her father's power, threatening Revan's job when she believed he was a waiter.<ref name="KotOR" /> Lavin was considered by many to be a spoiled brat and often used her father's enforcers to rough up those she met.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Equipment==
Lavin wore a beige and yellow tunic with grey pants, brown [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] and [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and a beige [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]].<ref name="KotOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|How dare you speak to me like that! Daddy's going to hear about this!|Lavin's response to one of several dialogue options|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
 [[File:LavinThugs.png|thumb|right|250px|Lavin and her enforcers. Lavin appears with black hair.]]
Lavin appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. Interactions with her are optional and do not progress any plot or quest. The player may avoid talking to Lavin completely and will never encounter her or her enforcers. During the initial encounter, if the Republic Soldier [[Carth Onasi]] is in the player's party, he will warn Revan to be careful with their words, feeling like it might result in trouble if he said something wrong.<ref name="KotOR" />

If the player decides to interact with her, they have several dialogue choices. If the player fails to persuade Lavin or chooses any other dialogue option, she will run out of the cantina and claim that she will speak to her father. When the player leaves that cantina, they will be confronted by Lavin and two [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]]-wielding [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] thugs near [[Kebla Yurt's Equipment Emporium]]. After the player defeats the thugs, Lavin will yell for her "Daddy" and run away. During this encounter, Lavin is portrayed with black hair and a different face model.<ref name="KotOR" />
